sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers advanced indefinites (n'importe qui/quoi/quel, quiconque, quelconque incl. its 'mediocre' sense, tous/tout/tout le monde), negative prefixes (in-/im-/il-/ir-, mal-, mé(s)-, dé(s)-, anti-), and the disagreement intensity scale (simple désaccord → opposition directe → revendication). Theme: regional identities and languages. Spirals from b1.2/unit-07-indefinites-negation. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 8 'Singularités' ('Les pronoms indéfinis' + 'Les préfixes' + 'Oppositions, désaccords et revendications', p.119; thème: langues régionales, l'Europe des régions). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
